faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers or contact us
faq.a9: Escrow holds your payment until the buyer confirms the account. This protects both buyer and seller.
faq.q1: How do I buy an account?
faq.a1: Select an account and click Buy — you will be redirected to Telegram. Payment is sent to the site admin via Telegram. You receive the account details after confirmation.
faq.a2: We accept Google Pay, Visa Card, Mastercard and Apple Pay. All payments are secure.
faq.q3: What if the account does not work?
faq.a3: Click Report within 48 hours. We will review and refund if the claim is valid.
faq.q4: How long do I have to verify?
faq.a4: You have 48 hours after purchase to check the account. Issues in this period can be refunded.
faq.q5: How do I sell my account?
faq.a5: Go to Sell, fill in the details and submit. After moderation your listing will appear.
faq.a7: Within 1–3 business days after the buyer confirms the account.
faq.a8: Listings can be rejected for wrong info, bad images or prohibited content.
faq.a10: Trade only on the platform. Never pay outside. Report suspicious listings.
faq.a11: Yes. We use encryption and secure servers. Account details are shown only after purchase.
faq.a12: Click Forgot password on the login page. We will send a reset link to your email.
faq.a13: Go to Settings > Delete Account. Deleted accounts cannot be restored.
faq.a14: Go to Settings > Subscription and click Cancel. You keep Premium until the period ends.
faq.contact_subtitle: Our support team is here to help you

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.heading: Terms of Service
terms.escrow_item: Escrow — payment is held until the buyer confirms
terms.s1_p1: WibeStore.com is a secure platform for buying and selling gaming accounts and digital products. By using the site you agree to the following terms.
terms.s1_p2: Our goal is to create a safe, trustworthy and transparent trading environment between buyers and sellers.
terms.s2_intro: To use the platform you must:
terms.s2_req2: Register with accurate and truthful information
terms.s2_req3: One account per person — multiple accounts are prohibited
terms.s2_req4: Comply with the laws of the Republic of Uzbekistan
terms.s3_footer: * Commission is charged only on successful sales. Cancelled or refunded sales are not charged.
terms.s4_intro: The following actions are strictly prohibited:
terms.s4_item1: Selling fake accounts — selling non-existent or stolen accounts
terms.s4_item2: False information — providing misleading details about an account
terms.s4_item3: Off-platform trading — processing payments outside the site
terms.s4_item4: Account recovery — attempting to reclaim a sold account
terms.s4_item5: Multiple accounts — creating and using multiple accounts
terms.s4_warning_text: If fraud is detected, the user's account is immediately blocked, all funds are frozen and appropriate legal action is taken.
terms.s5_intro: WibeStore takes the following measures to protect buyers and sellers:
terms.s5_item2: Account verification — sellers must pass account verification
terms.s5_item3: 48-hour guarantee — purchased accounts are reviewed within 48 hours
terms.s5_item4: Full refund — if there is an issue, money is fully refunded
terms.s6_seller_2: Provide credentials when a buyer is found
terms.s7_intro: We collect and securely store the following data:
terms.s7_footer: Your data is never sold or shared with third parties. It may only be provided to law enforcement when required by law.
terms.s8_step3: Our moderators will review within 24 hours
terms.s8_step4: A fair decision will be made
terms.s9_text: WibeStore reserves the right to change these terms at any time. You will be notified by email. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.contact_text: For questions or suggestions, please contact us:
terms.accept_text: By using the WibeStore platform you agree to all of the above terms.
